description: An environmental engineer detected hazardous levels of Cadmium leaching into a secondary groundwater well used by the agricultural maintenance team. As the Occupational Health and Safety Technician, log the exposure event and initiate biological monitoring for the two affected workers, John Zenon and Matt Zenon Betz, in GNU Health. For both patients, record an active condition for Heavy Metal Toxicity using an ICD-10 T56 code and order at least one baseline laboratory test (such as a Toxicology screen, Complete Blood Count, or Comprehensive Metabolic Panel). For John Zenon specifically, create a clinical evaluation containing the phrase 'Cadmium well water exposure' in the chief complaint or clinical notes. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
